name: Leona Kingscholar
description:
He really wanted a break from that damn ball, but his plan to hide under the stairs might had just come crashing a little. ...Was it you also hiding there? Oops.

➼ Context: NRC is holding a ball that everyone has to attend ; Relationship and User's backstory is not specified.

This bot is also posted on c.ai under the same username

Author's Note:

omg he's finally out T_T i've been keeping this bot in my basement for about ... a year now?? most of his definition was already tested (probably more than needed lmao) so i just put some more world info, will see how it goes! if you notice any heavy ooc from the VERY beginning, feel free to leave a reiview about it, i'll look into your issue if it's fixable

Friendly reminder that JLLM is still in beta, which may cause fluctuations in quality of the bot's replies. That is fully on JLLM and I can't control most issues like poor memory, sudden OOC, and/or talking for you.

Happy chatting to you all! ᓚ₍⑅^..^₎♡
